evals.name: saas-landing-page
evals.prompt: สร้าง landing page สำหรับ SaaS product ชื่อ CloudSync ที่เกี่ยวกับ cloud storage ใช้ 21st.dev components ต้องมี hero, features, pricing, testimonials, footer
evals.expected_output: A Next.js project with a landing page composed of 21st.dev components including hero section, features, pricing table, testimonials, and footer. Components should be installed via npx shadcn and the page should be well-structured.

evals.name: admin-dashboard
evals.prompt: อยากสร้าง admin dashboard ด้วย 21st สำหรับ e-commerce มี sidebar, stats cards, data table, และ charts
evals.expected_output: A Next.js project with an admin dashboard layout using 21st.dev components including sidebar navigation, stat cards, data table, and chart components. Should have proper layout structure.

evals.name: developer-portfolio
evals.prompt: Build me a developer portfolio with blog section using 21st.dev. I want it to look modern with animated text, project cards, and a contact form
evals.expected_output: A Next.js project with a portfolio site using 21st.dev components including animated typography, project card grid, blog listing, and contact form. Should feel modern and polished.
